zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de CORNOUAILLES於1138年5月19日出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall39歲，母親Beatrice FitzWilliam23歲。她於大約1160年與Guy IV de LAVAL在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1203年5月在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年65歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰藍德斯可勒爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de CORNOUAILLES于1138年5月19日出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall39岁，母亲Beatrice FitzWilliam23岁。她于大约1160年与Guy IV de LAVAL在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1203年5月在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易安格斯享年65岁，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰藍德斯可勒爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de CORNOUAILLES was born on 19 May 1138, in England, United Kingdom, her father, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, was 39 and her mother, Beatrice FitzWilliam, was 23. She married Guy IV de LAVAL about 1160, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in May 1203, in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Clermont, Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de CORNOUAILLES est née le 19 mai 1138, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Beatrice FitzWilliam, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Guy IV de LAVAL environ 1160, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en mai 1203, à Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Clermont, Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de CORNOUAILLES am 19. Mai 1138 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall 39 und ihre Mutter Beatrice FitzWilliam 23. Sie hat um 1160 in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Guy IV de LAVAL geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im Mai 1203 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Clermont, Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de CORNOUAILLES è nata il il 19 maggio 1138 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Beatrice FitzWilliam, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Guy IV de LAVAL circa 1160, nel Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1203, nel Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Clermont, Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de CORNOUAILLESが1138年5月19日にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwallは39歳，母Beatrice FitzWilliamは23歳であった。約1160年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメイエンラヴァルでGuy IV de LAVALと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1203年5月にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーアンジャーズで65歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインランズクラーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de CORNOUAILLES(이)가 1138년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice FitzWilliam(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 Guy IV de LAVAL(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1203년 5월 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 랜데스 클레몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de CORNOUAILLES nasceu em 19 de maio de 1138, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice FitzWilliam, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Guy IV de LAVAL aproximadamente 1160, em Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em maio de 1203, em Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Clermont, Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de CORNOUAILLES родилась 19 мая 1138 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice FitzWilliam, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy IV de LAVAL около 1160 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла май 1203 г. в местности ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности клирмонт, ландесь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de CORNOUAILLES nació el 19 de mayo de 1138, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald de Dunstanville Earl of Cornwall, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Beatrice FitzWilliam, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Guy IV de LAVAL aproximadamente 1160, en Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1203, en Angers, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Clermont, Landes, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
